[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000101101 4
3 0110100111 6
4 0101000111 5
5 0000101000 2
6 1110100001 5
7 0000101101 4
